subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Critically analyse the features of natural wonders described in the chapter
Understand the ecological and geographical factors behind the Valley of Flowers
Evaluate the sustainability of Living Root Bridges as an example of natural engineering
Develop analytical reading and interpretation skills
Encourage awareness about environmental conservation and responsible tourism
Enhance advanced vocabulary and descriptive writing abilities

lesson_plan.title: Analysing Natural Wonders
topics_covered: Natural vs man-made wonders from an analytical perspective
Impact of natural wonders on tourism and environment
teaching_strategy: Use of visual examples of famous natural wonders
student_activities: Analyse why certain places are called natural wonders
Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of tourism in natural areas

lesson_plan.title: Geographical Study of the Valley of Flowers
topics_covered: Location and physical geography of the region
Climate conditions of the Himalayan ecosystem
Influence of altitude and rainfall on plant life
student_activities: Locate the Valley of Flowers on a map
Explain how geographical factors influence biodiversity

lesson_plan.title: Biodiversity and Ecosystem Analysis
topics_covered: Relationship between plants, animals, and ecosystem balance
student_activities: Create a small chart showing biodiversity in the Valley of Flowers
Discuss how human activities affect ecosystems

lesson_plan.title: Living Root Bridges – Sustainable Engineering
topics_covered: Formation process of Living Root Bridges
teaching_strategy: Teacher presentation with images or diagrams
student_activities: Prepare a comparison between root bridges and modern bridges
Explain why root bridges are considered sustainable

lesson_plan.title: Environmental Conservation and Responsible Tourism
topics_covered: Effects of tourism on fragile ecosystems
student_activities: Design a short awareness message about protecting natural wonders

lesson_plan.title: Advanced Language and Reflection
student_activities: Write a descriptive paragraph imagining a visit to the Valley of Flowers
Use new vocabulary words in meaningful sentences

teaching_aids: Images or videos of the Valley of Flowers and Living Root Bridges
teacher_tip: Encourage students to research additional natural wonders of India and discuss how geographical and ecological factors contribute to their uniqueness.
